mapper.sql: SELECT wr.SERVICE_NO as serviceNo, wr.CONTRACT_NO as contractNo, wr.SUB_CD as subCd, wr.REQ_DT as reqDt, wr.REQ_COMP_CD as reqCompCd, wr.REQ_USER_ID as reqUserId, wr.REQ_CONTENTS as reqContents, wr.PROC_DT as procDt, wr.PROC_USER_NM as procUserNm, wr.PROC_SUPPORT_CD as procSupportCd, wr.PROC_CONTENTS as procContents, wr.REMARK as remark, (SELECT c.CODE_TEXT FROM TC_COMMON_CODE c WHERE c.CODE_CD = wr.PROC_SUPPORT_CD LIMIT 1) as procSupportNm, (SELECT c.CODE_TEXT FROM TC_COMMON_CODE c WHERE c.CODE_CD = wr.PROC_RESULT_CD LIMIT 1) as procResultNm, (SELECT c.CODE_TEXT FROM TC_COMMON_CODE c WHERE c.CODE_CD = wr.STATUS_CD LIMIT 1) as statusNm, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT f.FILE_NM SEPARATOR ', ') FROM TC_FILE f WHERE f.FILE_ID = wr.SERVICE_NO AND f.DEL_YN = 'N') as fileNames, s.SW_NM as swName, svc.CODE_TEXT as serviceCdNm, cust.COMPANY_NM as customerCompanyNm, cust.DEPARTMENT_NM as customerDepartmentNm, cust.MANAGE_NM as customerManageNm, u.USER_NM as reqUserNm, u.USER_DEPT_NM as userDeptNm, reqd.DEPARTMENT_NM as reqUserDepartmentNm, reqd.COMPANY_NM as reqUserCompanyNm, certc.CODE_TEXT as certCdNm, partd.COMPANY_NM as partnerCompanyNm, cert.CERT_CD as certCd, cert.CERT_DT as certDt, cert.CERT_COMMENT as certComment, COALESCE(surv.POINT_DIS_YN, 'N') as pointDisYn, surv.POINT_SUM as pointSum FROM TS_WORK_HISTORY wr INNER JOIN TS_WORK_SW_PARTNER p ON wr.SUB_CD = p.SUB_CD INNER JOIN TC_USER u ON wr.REQ_USER_ID = u.USER_ID INNER JOIN TS_WORK_SW s ON p.SW_CD = s.SW_CD LEFT JOIN TC_COMMON_CODE svc ON wr.SERVICE_CD = svc.CODE_CD LEFT JOIN TC_COMMON_CODE certc ON wr.PROC_RESULT_CD = certc.CODE_CD LEFT JOIN TS_WORK_SURVEY surv ON wr.SERVICE_NO = surv.SERVICE_NO LEFT JOIN TS_WORK_CERT cert ON wr.SERVICE_NO = cert.SERVICE_NO LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE cust ON wr.REQ_COMP_CD = cust.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE partd ON wr.PROC_DEPT_CD = partd.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE reqd ON u.DEPT_CD = reqd.ORIGIN_CD WHERE 1=1

sql.if: AND wr.REQ_DT BETWEEN #{startDate} AND DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TS_WORK_HISTORY wr INNER JOIN TS_WORK_SW_PARTNER p ON wr.SUB_CD = p.SUB_CD INNER JOIN TC_USER u ON wr.REQ_USER_ID = u.USER_ID INNER JOIN TS_WORK_SW s ON p.SW_CD = s.SW_CD LEFT JOIN TS_WORK_SURVEY surv ON wr.SERVICE_NO = surv.SERVICE_NO LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE cust ON wr.REQ_COMP_CD = cust.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE partd ON wr.PROC_DEPT_CD = partd.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE reqd ON u.DEPT_CD = reqd.ORIGIN_CD WHERE 1=1
